headline: Buy These 3 Sales Growth Stocks as Markets Continue to Move Higher
summary: HEICO tops a screen for cash-rich, steady sales growers, alongside Dillard's and CBRE Group, as resilient U.S. markets keep pushing higher.

raw.headline: Buy These 3 Sales Growth Stocks as Markets Continue to Move Higher

headline: Colliers International Group: Paying A Brokerage Multiple For A Compounder
summary: Colliers (CIGI) offers a Buy setup after -22.7% returns: 13x forward earnings, 70% recurring revenue and quality vs CBRE.
